prompt: Write a dry one-paragraph Amazon review of the experience of waking up.
response: The "waking up" experience offered a predictable, if somewhat jarring, transition from unconsciousness. Installation was automatic, requiring no discernible user input. Feature-wise, the initial moments were often characterized by a persistent feeling of disorientation and a noticeable drop in core system performance. While it eventually stabilized into a basic operational state, the overall experience lacked any innovative features or significant improvements from previous iterations. Functioned as advertised, but without any discernible enthusiasm.
